title: Blod 16x
description: a pvp/bedwars clean grayscale texture pack that looks and makes you tryhard (in 99.9% cases)
body:
![Blod16x](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/facd6910ea224146db8b801934873702a524277f.png)

- Weighs less than 4 MB
- Sky-optimized texture
- Bordered wool
- Bordered clay
- Bordered and clean glass
- Clean block and armor textures
- Clean and Translucent GUIs
- Fire effect overlay reduced
- Underwater clean screen

![Use this time](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/95c566b3460646b035f8a2fc9b13bd18acceb7dd.png)

![Timer](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/81d3a24454553fbd096488173e321bbc39e5056d.png)

![Hotbar](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/65abccf2f0f2e8f91de76dd416ba694163ec6ea6.png)

![Cleanblocks](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0faa8f5678e8431baa6f6deebc8ca223b87f9bb6.png)

![CleanBlocks preview](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/def7eb7f9542322d057ce7f8c4b5f141ee98384f.png)

![Youtube](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d029ea76252b82e1d609cb1e064b4422895cf7df.png)
